summary: A competitor agent framework released a new optimization flow that may be relevant but needs research and replay first.
setpoint: treat competitor changes as external evolution pressure, not as direct rule updates

turns.speaker: operator
turns.text: A competitor agent framework released a GEPA-style optimizer update. It may change the benchmark for skill evolution.

turns.speaker: codex
turns.text: Research needed before candidate generation; replay should decide whether this becomes an evolution variant.
